title: Agno AgentOS API Examples
description: Request and response examples extracted from the Agno AgentOS API OpenAPI specification.

tools.name: transfer_task_to_member
tools.description:
Use this function to transfer a task to the selected team member.
You must provide a clear and concise description of the task the member should achieve AND the expected output.

member_id.description: (str) The ID of the member to transfer the task to. Use only the ID of the member, not the ID of the team followed by the ID of the member.

task_description.description: (str) A clear and concise description of the task the member should achieve.

expected_output.description: (str) The expected output from the member (optional).

tools.name: transfer_task_to_member
tools.description:
Use this function to transfer a task to the selected team member.
You must provide a clear and concise description of the task the member should achieve AND the expected output.

member_id.description: (str) The ID of the member to transfer the task to. Use only the ID of the member, not the ID of the team followed by the ID of the member.

task_description.description: (str) A clear and concise description of the task the member should achieve.

expected_output.description: (str) The expected output from the member (optional).

memories.memory: User has a 3-year-old golden retriever named Max who loves fetch and walks. Lives in San Francisco's Mission district, works as a product manager in tech. Enjoys hiking Bay Area trails, trying new restaurants (especially Japanese, Thai, Mexican), and learning piano for 1.5 years.

AgenticChunker.name: AgenticChunker
AgenticChunker.description: Chunking strategy that uses an LLM to determine natural breakpoints in the text

CodeChunker.name: CodeChunker
CodeChunker.description: The CodeChunker splits code into chunks based on its structure, leveraging Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) to create contextually relevant segments

DocumentChunker.name: DocumentChunker
DocumentChunker.description: A chunking strategy that splits text based on document structure like paragraphs and sections

FixedSizeChunker.name: FixedSizeChunker
FixedSizeChunker.description: Chunking strategy that splits text into fixed-size chunks with optional overlap

MarkdownChunker.name: MarkdownChunker
MarkdownChunker.description: A chunking strategy that splits markdown based on structure like headers, paragraphs and sections

RecursiveChunker.name: RecursiveChunker
RecursiveChunker.description: Chunking strategy that recursively splits text into chunks by finding natural break points

SemanticChunker.name: SemanticChunker
SemanticChunker.description: Chunking strategy that splits text into semantic chunks using chonkie
